mapper.insert: insert into aiw_ai_prompt_template (biz_id, prompt_code, prompt_version, scenario, template_name, template_content, status, description, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by) values (#{bizId}, #{promptCode}, #{promptVersion}, #{scenario}, #{templateName}, #{templateContent}, #{status}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}) on duplicate key update scenario = values(scenario), template_name = values(template_name), template_content = values(template_content), status = values(status), description = values(description), updated_at = values(updated_at), updated_by = values(updated_by)

insert into aiw_ai_prompt_variable (biz_id, prompt_biz_id, variable_name, source_path, required, description, created_at) values (#{bizId}, #{promptBizId}, #{variableName}, #{sourcePath}, #{required}, #{description}, #{createdAt})
insert into aiw_ai_prompt_output_schema (biz_id, prompt_biz_id, schema_version, schema_json, created_at) values (#{bizId}, #{promptBizId}, #{schemaVersion}, #{schemaJson}, #{createdAt})
